ops.body:
P5 CLOSED — epic complete. The live regression capstone (workflow wf_09b87401-d6d, round 2) passed all five asks, and it earned its keep on the way: three real engine defects invisible to the 1100+ offline tests, all one family (selection crowd-out / silent drop), each caught live, ruled, fixed, adversarially reviewed, and shipped before its re-ask. R-I cabin cohort crowd-out (3856327d, note 7dd34177); R-J beam ranking date-infeasible chains + R-K leads never reaching the board (95f514f7); R-L window-padding crowd-out + R-M silent optional-variant starvation (145ee400, note 241d8657). Meta-lesson standing: selection-diversity changes need a mixed-axis pool fixture per axis — origin, cabin, window.

Final verdicts: A1 canonical-r2 4/4 — business surfaces end to end, J shortlist rows → 16 J→J composed → a J/J notable stretch promoted with no phantom cabin miss (driver note 60794f4e). A2 hybrid-r2 4/4 — 23 hybrid journeys at the DEFAULT beam (round 1: zero), 624 date-infeasible chains disclosed pre-beam, $cash:FJD on the rank front, per-leg judgment on the cash hop. A3 multicity 4/4 — two stay intervals derived from observed clocks, door-to-door fit across the chain. A4 positioning-r2 5/5 — skip_sources disclosed, both origins swept (R-E), in-window LAX rows survive selection (R-L), provenance.variants accounts for both variants (R-M), cash leg carries no cabin miss. A5 postmortem 4/4 — the home-origin floor displaced a row on every endpoint, mixed-cabin acceptance evidenced, generation-honest supersession, a composed journey on the board; no concrete July-14 market exists in any durable record, so SFO→Asia business ran as the class representative, stated honestly. Quota: ~227 calls total across the capstone, floors never approached, ~720 remaining.

Demo re-captured (016585ffd89f, CI green): docs/scripts/demo-board.json regenerated from canonical-r2's own finalists — six ranked Honolulu journeys plus the all-business stretch, honest to the artifacts down to the unstated-currency American legs rendering as text and the one-option picker — and docs/assets/board.webp re-rendered via docs/scripts/demo.sh. Supersedes W7's capture as planned.

The reframe holds end to end: the same engine that prices the canonical round trip now composes multi-city, positioning, either-mode hybrids, optional variants, manual chains, and scouted endpoints — every cut disclosed, every silence made visible.
